title: calea pinheiroi
intro: Calea pinheiroi, also known as Pinheiro's plant or Brazilian thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to Brazil. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calea pinheiroi include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. The herbal preparations of Calea pinheiroi typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves or flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications for skin conditions.
